Video.summary: A teenage boy abuses his mom, often getting his younger brother involved. He says that he got the idea when he'd witnessed one of his mother's boyfriends pull a knife on her.
Video.title: We Beat Up Our Mom

Video.summary: A look at guests who are subjected to emotional abuse that chips away at their self-worth and independence.
Video.title: Relationships Exposed

Video.summary: Sheroya is 17 and struggling to raise 2 kids while trying to party all the time. Her boyfriend Malcolm frequently cheats and verbally abuses her. Steve’s got a lot of work ahead with this couple, but will either of them wake up?
Video.title: Steve Over the Edge

Video.summary: Heather is 17 years old and she says her boyfriend Anthony is the father of her child. But Anthony thinks his brother, Tracy is the father. Then, Roxana believes her two-year-old nephew was beaten by his mother Kyesha.
Video.title: Did He Abuse My Son?

Video.summary: Danielle’s children were taken out of her care after cops observed all 4 children, including her newborn, home alone. Her fifth and sixth babies were taken from her care, too. But she wants to prove that she could be a good mom!
Video.title: 6 Kids Taken Away, but I Want More

Image.alt: 6 Kids Taken Away, but I Want More
6 Kids Taken Away, but I Want More
6 Kids Taken Away, but I Want More

Video.summary: Russell wants to put his family back together after his 3 children died in a fire. Next, Tatiana believes her 2-year old nephew was abused. And she's accusing her sister's ex-fiance Chris. Chris says he's not an abuser.
Video.title: Did You Leave My Kids to Die?

Image.alt: Did You Leave My Kids to Die?
Did You Leave My Kids to Die?
Did You Leave My Kids to Die?

Video.summary: Marlon claims he caught Bernard molesting his own nephew two years ago! Bernard and his sister accuse Marlon of lying! Later, Tarone found out his sister’s boyfriend Donald molested their daughter. Donald says he mistook her for her aunt Felitha!
Video.title: An Unexpected Confession

Video.summary: Nesi thinks Omar is cheating on her with another man from text messages on his phone. Plus, Karissa’s life fell apart after she and her husband moved in with Josh! A few weeks later, their baby mysteriously died. What will the lie detectors say?
Video.title: Does My Boyfriend Have a Gay Secret?

Image.alt: Does My Boyfriend Have a Gay Secret?
Does My Boyfriend Have a Gay Secret?
Does My Boyfriend Have a Gay Secret?

Video.summary: Maria is convinced that her son’s ex-girlfriend Amy and her new boyfriend Brian are abusing and neglecting her granddaughter. But Amy says that Maria is racist and angry because her granddaughter is being raised in a Hispanic household
Video.title: Who’s Hurting My Granddaughter?

Video.summary: Debra lost custody of her 7 kids due to abuse allegations. Her daughters Alisha and Ariel want to know what happened to them years ago. Debra moved in with Alisha, but allegedly slept with her husband! Can Debra prove her innocence to her kids?
Video.title: Our Mom Is A Monster

Video.summary: Brandi and Marty have been together 5 years. Brandi's brother and her mother claim that Marty is being physically abusive and has been cheating. Plus, Jessica worries that Derwin is now cheating on her and claims that he's been abusive towards her.
Video.title: Steve, I'm Not An Abuser

Video.summary: Telisha and teen son Curtis return to the show because she wants him tested for paternity of a young woman's baby.
Video.title: DNA: I Need To Tell Her I'm Gay

Image.alt: DNA: I Need To Tell Her I'm Gay
DNA: I Need To Tell Her I'm Gay
DNA: I Need To Tell Her I'm Gay

Video.summary: Tina and her ex-boyfriend “G” split up after she revealed her pregnancy and he became abusive. She believes his ex Patrice is placing doubts in his head to keep them apart and “G” contends Tina is out to get him, but wants to be in the child’s life.
Video.title: A Pattern of Abuse?

Video.summary: Josh constantly accuses and hits Elizabeth for cheating. Then, John gave up his womanizing ways when he met Erica, but she can’t help but wonder if he actually did! Finally, Haley cheated on Larry before, but swears she has not done it again!
Video.title: He Punches, Spits, And Cheats On You...Pick a Door

Image.alt: He Punches, Spits, And Cheats On You...Pick a Door
He Punches, Spits, And Cheats On You...Pick a Door
He Punches, Spits, And Cheats On You...Pick a Door

Video.summary: A woman's partner will not marry her unless she can prove her child is his; Gaylon and Sarah return to the show to have another of her children tested.
Video.title: DNA: Make the Accusations Stop!

Video.summary: Nathan currently has 4 children with 2 different women and is in a serious mountain of trouble. Jamie, his first baby's mother, is tired of his lasting neglect for their 3 kids and needs him to step up to the role.
Video.title: You Call Yourself A Father?

Video.summary: The laziest husband and wife lie about their child in order to get support from a woman who believes the child is her grandchild.
Video.title: He's Not Your Son

Video.summary: Risha is accused of being involved in her best friend's murder; an update on Tabatha, who revealed on the show that her boyfriend allowed her to prostitute so they could get high together.
Video.title: Murder Accusations Cause Chaos

Video.summary: Jared says that he is positive that his wife Sarah is cheating on him and he admits to physically abusing Sarah because he says he hates being lied to. Sarah, who is pregnant, says that she's desperate to stop Jared's abusing ways.
Video.title: My Kids Watch Him Hit Me

Image.alt: My Kids Watch Him Hit Me
My Kids Watch Him Hit Me
My Kids Watch Him Hit Me

Video.summary: Lanikka is sick and tired of her boyfriend Malcom’s jealousy and abusive ways. Then, Tim’s jealous ways have torn his family apart, but now he’s desperate to win them back, but will Tiffany leave him for good?
Video.title: She Is My Property

Video.summary: Joyia is desperate to keep her friend Stephanie from going back to her abusive boyfriend Scott. If Stephanie takes him back, Scott will continue to abuse her. But she still loves him! Will she have the strength to leave him?
Video.title: How Can You Still Love Him?

Image.alt: How Can You Still Love Him?
How Can You Still Love Him?
How Can You Still Love Him?

Video.summary: Lianna and Devone have been married for a year, but she suspects Devone of being unfaithful because he stays out all night and is rarely home. Then, Kya is out on a $50,000 bond for allegedly abusing her newborn son, but did she do it?
Video.title: Is Our Life Together a Lie?

Image.alt: Is Our Life Together a Lie?
Is Our Life Together a Lie?
Is Our Life Together a Lie?

Video.summary: Robert believes his daughter is being abused and molested by her stepfather, John, but John and Tiffany denies any abuse. Is Tiffany covering for John’s abuse? See the shocking lie detector test today!
Video.title: A Father's Fight for His Daughter

Image.alt: A Father's Fight for His Daughter
A Father's Fight for His Daughter
A Father's Fight for His Daughter

Video.summary: Holly says her mother is envious of her and has made up accusations that she has been sleeping with her stepfather; Jovanni reacts to his girlfriend's ironclad proof that he is cheating.
Video.title: Are My Husband and Daughter Having Sex?

Image.alt: Are My Husband and Daughter Having Sex?
Are My Husband and Daughter Having Sex?
Are My Husband and Daughter Having Sex?

Video.summary: TJ refuses to let Ashley see their child after a video of her blowing marijuana smoke into the baby’s face. Then, Tiffany blames Shawn for their 10 year old daughter’s smoking and wandering the streets. Can Steve intervene before it’s too late?
Video.title: Bad Mom Caught on Tape

Video.summary: Two years ago, Sharon gained custody of her daughter Megan and James’ child due to James’ abusive behavior. Megan admitted to him kicking her in the stomach while pregnant, but now says he is a changed man. Can they prove it to Sharon and Steve?
Video.title: Abused While Pregnant

Video.summary: Connie wants Steve’s help to stop her daughter Angel from marrying Matt. She claims Matt gave her Angel a black eye, broken nose, concussion, and 3 knocked out teeth. Can Connie reason with Angel and convince her to leave this abusive relationship?
Video.title: He Put Me in the Hospital But I'm Still Marrying Him

Image.alt: He Put Me in the Hospital But I'm Still Marrying Him
He Put Me in the Hospital But I'm Still Marrying Him
He Put Me in the Hospital But I'm Still Marrying Him

Video.summary: Joe refuses to believe lie-detector test results that prove his wife has been faithful; Cassandra will not marry her boyfriend until she finds out the truth about some unusual occurrences.
Video.title: Steve, She Controls My Every Move

Image.alt: Steve, She Controls My Every Move
Steve, She Controls My Every Move
Steve, She Controls My Every Move

Video.summary: Morgan was bullied to the point where she quit cheerleading after a manipulated photo of her went viral. She and her mom Michelle are here to confront her bullies! Later, Kedrick accused Sonya of cheating months after they shacked up!
Video.title: 15 Year Old Girl Bullied Online

Video.summary: Pregnant Natasha kicked out her children's father because she suspects he is cheating, possibly with a member of his own family; Aaron denies being his fiancee's baby's dad.
Video.title: You Slept With The Man Who Shot Your Boyfriend?

Image.alt: You Slept With The Man Who Shot Your Boyfriend?
You Slept With The Man Who Shot Your Boyfriend?
You Slept With The Man Who Shot Your Boyfriend?

Video.summary: Friends Raychele and Junova deny stealing from their employer, but one of them is not telling the truth; Gabrielle suspects that her sisters stole $1,000 from her purse.
Video.title: Did You Steal The Money That Got Me Fired?

Image.alt: Did You Steal The Money That Got Me Fired?
Did You Steal The Money That Got Me Fired?
Did You Steal The Money That Got Me Fired?

Video.summary: Robert says he believes that his daughters mother has been abusing her and he wants to prove the abuse and gain full custody of his daughter. Then, Casey claims her ex-boyfriend is abusive towards their kids and she wants him out of their lives.
Video.title: I Have Proof, You're Abusing Our Child

Image.alt: I Have Proof, You're Abusing Our Child
I Have Proof, You're Abusing Our Child
I Have Proof, You're Abusing Our Child
